Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I watched a boxing DVD with Sanada.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}That final round was one of the greatest in the history of boxing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} has improved[n]from watching the boxers fight so hard...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}All right, we should probably call it a night. Early to bed, early to rise, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Might not be a bad idea to take some protein before you sleep. In this situation, casein would be more effective than whey...[n]{f 1 1}
